The '''striped folk''' were a subspecies of the [[Kentra]] of [[Orellon II]] with striped fur who inhabited the grasslands adjacent to rivers and streams. They were physically very strong and at the same time extremely patient. They were experts in camouflage. There were a few farming communities among the Striped folk.<ref name="TP" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}}
